report:
## Your Health Assessment

Thank you for completing our health assessment. Your answers paint an interesting picture—you're functioning well in many areas, with solid energy and mental clarity, yet something still feels off. That "feel better" goal tells us there's room to optimize, and we can see where.

### Signs of Gut Microbial Imbalance

Two of your answers stand out together: the white tongue coating and diarrhea. A coated tongue, especially upon waking, is one of the clearest external indicators of intestinal dysbiosis—an imbalance in gut bacteria. Diarrhea often reflects an "overexcited" gut state, frequently driven by microbial overgrowth and the inflammatory signals they produce. These two symptoms appearing together suggest your gut flora deserves attention, even though your energy levels remain strong.

### Fragmented Sleep Despite Good Energy

You report waking at night to urinate and difficulty getting up in the morning—yet your daytime energy is solid. This pattern suggests the issue isn't overall energy production, but rather *when* and *how* your body is cycling through rest and activity. Nighttime urination can signal disrupted mineral balance or elevated stress hormones during sleep, which fragments your rest even when total sleep time seems adequate. The morning difficulty often follows naturally—your body hasn't completed the deep, restorative phases it needs.

### The Rhythm Connection

Your variable eating pattern may be quietly amplifying both of these patterns. Inconsistent meal timing can disrupt gut motility and circadian signaling—the internal clock that governs everything from digestion to hormone release to sleep quality. When these rhythms fall out of sync, the gut and sleep often show it first.

---

These patterns often interconnect in ways that a comprehensive consultation can fully uncover. We'd love to explore your unique situation in more depth.

[Book a consultation](https://prism.miami/booking) to start your journey toward better health.
